purpose: Shared dependency-free PowerShell functions for mission preflight, approval matching, worker handoff, post-run verification, state copying, and preservation packets.
authority_note: TSF-local foreground infrastructure only; grants no restricted authority.

purpose: Validates one mission packet and writes a preflight result.
authority_note: Does not start a worker, runner, all-fleet command, server, or product repo action.

purpose: Creates a bounded worker instruction packet only after approved preflight.
authority_note: V1 is a stub and records STUB_READY_CODEX_CLI_BLOCKED; no Codex CLI invocation.

purpose: Verifies one worker result against one mission packet and fails closed on missing artifacts or restricted action evidence.
authority_note: Does not run product validation or proof runs.

purpose: Writes a preservation packet from mission, preflight, worker, and verifier evidence.
authority_note: Preserves evidence only; does not approve future work.

purpose: Documents the local ledger shape with zero active approvals.
